zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前价格围绕0.1517附近徘徊，整体处于均线下方运行，短线走势偏弱但未破位，呈现窄幅整理结构，多空动能趋于平衡状态。

MACD维持负值动能，空头优势仍存；价格持续低于SMA20，说明中期均线压制明显，反弹缺乏量能配合。

下方支撑关注0.1514及0.1500整数关口，上方阻力在0.1531及0.1540附近，突破需成交量放大确认。

短线维持区间思路，高位轻仓试空，低位关注支撑吸纳，止损严格控制，等待方向确认。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano against the US dollar is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation structure following a marginal 24-hour gain. Price action at 0.151712 remains compressed near the lower end of the day’s range, indicating limited bullish follow-through. Trading below the 20-period SMA at 0.153104 suggests short-term bearish pressure persists. Market participants appear cautious, with volatility contracting and directional conviction weakening. This setup reflects a neutral-to-bearish intraday bias.

MACD remains in negative territory at -0.0020543, reinforcing weakening momentum and absence of strong bullish divergence. With the signal line unavailable, confirmation is limited, but histogram behavior still implies downside pressure dominance. RSI data is not provided, yet price stability near session lows suggests momentum is leaning bearish rather than oversold. Overall momentum conditions favor continuation of range-bound to slightly downward movement unless volume expands.

Immediate support is established near the intraday low at 0.151441, with a secondary psychological floor around 0.150000 if selling pressure accelerates. Resistance is first seen at 0.152435, aligning with the session high, followed by the 20-day SMA at 0.153104 acting as a dynamic barrier. A sustained break above this level could open path toward 0.155000 region. Failure to reclaim resistance would likely keep price capped within the current narrow range.

From a trading perspective, ADA/USD is better suited for range strategies until a decisive breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight stops below 0.1514, targeting the upper resistance zone. Alternatively, bearish entries could be considered on rejection at 0.1531. A confirmed close above the SMA would strengthen bullish setups, while breakdown below support would favor continuation shorts.
